mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_stock < safety_stock
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stock_seq) FROM stock_batches WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_quantity > 0 AND expiration_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_buys WHERE status = 'RECRUITING' AND end_date >= NOW()
SELECT stock_name AS name, current_stock AS value FROM stocks WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} ORDER BY current_stock DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(target_date, '%c월') AS month, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM finances WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND type = 'INCOME' AND target_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(target_date, '%c월'), MONTH(target_date) ORDER BY MONTH(target_date) ASC

SELECT gb.group_buy_seq AS id, gb.group_name AS title, gb.status, gb.target_participants AS targetParticipants, gb.current_participants AS currentParticipants, gb.end_date AS endDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_buy_participants WHERE group_buy_seq = gb.group_buy_seq AND user_seq = #{userSeq}) AS isJoined FROM group_buys gb WHERE gb.status = 'RECRUITING' AND gb.end_date >= NOW() ORDER BY gb.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
